checkin.journal:
Amazing morning start, need to do some meditation tomorrow, came today too, been happy and calm but a bit without energy
Chatn - felt good
Made lots of drink
We went to town market
Breakfast in Slovenska hisa
Fetiche deserts 
Went to Rutar and bought 2 mattresses
Cinema indiana jones was just ok
Spoke to my sister and walkie - thinking about the acid in my stomach
Met my friend from Fetiche, been super happy to try new things there, what a beautiful pastry shop damn,
Inspired by: fetiche desert
